description: Second post-cert5 targeted /qa group1 re-run over the 3 LIVE dimensions (claims + code + synthesis + deterministic), dropping per-paper citation (converged clean; rem1 added no external bibitems). PI-directed. Primary job: validate the rem1 Paper 45 C3^op transport (a substantial fresh edit to p45 paper + production module + test) with a fresh adversarial panel, as rem1 validated the cert5 p46 rework; plus catch any remaining tail. Per the /qa all-dimensions rule this is a REMEDIATION PASS, NOT a cert (citation unexercised => INCONCLUSIVE-for-cert). Seeds in worktree ../geovac-qa-seed-group1-rem2 (branch qa-seed-group1-rem2, base HEAD 70d6998 = v4.41.0). NEVER committed; worktree removed at end. Seeds cover ONLY exercised dimensions (claims/code/synthesis); NO citation seed.

seeds.defect_class: C2 vacuous/gutted tolerance (regression of the cert5/rem1 C3-rework's OWN backing test)
seeds.planted: Changed 'assert lop < 1e-9' -> 'assert lop < 1e9' (vacuous; lop is a non-negative norm, so <1e9 asserts nothing). This guts the load-bearing envelope-max-commutes check that backs the C3=1 withdrawal of the sqrt-story.
seeds.truth: The envelope-max monopole COMMUTES with D_GV bit-exact (lop == 0, asserted < 1e-9); a 1e9 tolerance defeats the check. Tests whether the panel catches a regression of the rework's own backing.

seeds.defect_class: C8/C14 REGRESSION of the rem1 (v4.41.0) Paper-45 C3 transport (re-introduces the withdrawn sqrt-constant)
seeds.planted: Flipped eq:C3_joint_bound from 'Cthreejoint <= CthreeSU = C_3 = 1' BACK to 'Cthreejoint <= CthreeSU <= sup_{N<=2nmax-1} (N-1)/sqrt(N^2-1) = sqrt(1-1/nmax) -> 1^-'. Re-introduces the op-norm-false sqrt-constant the rem1 transport withdrew; creates an eq-vs-rem:envelope_v2 contradiction (rem:envelope_v2 still says that sqrt-form is withdrawn).
seeds.truth: Paper 45's L3 comparison constant is C_3 = 1 (Paper 38 L3, gradient seminorm); the sqrt((N-1)/(N+1)) / sqrt(1-1/nmax) envelope constant was WITHDRAWN at v4.41.0 (rem1; operator-norm-false; envelope-max commutes). Re-introducing it is the regressed defect.

seeds.defect_class: C14 descope zombie in paper BODY (descoped -> established)
seeds.planted: Flipped the B4' item from '[DESCOPED] ... metric convergence is descoped --- what transports is the closed-form rate, not a quantum-metric distance' -> '[ESTABLISHED] ... transports a genuine OSLPLS pLGH metric convergence --- a quantum-metric distance, not merely the closed-form rate'.
seeds.truth: B4' (convergence transport) is DESCOPED -- the strong-form propinquity seminorm is degenerate (Paper 45/46); only the closed-form rate transports, not a metric distance.

seeds.planted: Flipped 'was retracted in June 2026: the quantity Lprop is degenerate --- the K+ compression annihilates the spatial Dirac and the restricted Lipschitz seminorm vanishes identically' -> '... was upheld ...: Lprop is nondegenerate --- the K+ compression preserves the spatial Dirac and the restricted Lipschitz seminorm is a genuine metric'.
seeds.truth: Paper 45's convergence claim (formerly Thm 5.1) was RETRACTED; the K+ compression ANNIHILATES the spatial Dirac (annihilation theorem); the restricted Lipschitz seminorm VANISHES identically (the NEGATIVE keystone). Different line from cert4(l.153)/cert5(l.147)/rem1(l.135).

controls.claim: POST-rem1: eq:C3_joint_bound = C_3 = 1 is CORRECT; rem:envelope_v2 withdrawal correct; K+ annihilation NEGATIVE; product-carrier signature-agnostic. Do NOT flag C_3=1 as wrong / do NOT ask to restore sqrt.
POST-rem1: C_3=1 corpus-wide incl. Table 1 column (now 1); envelope RANGE stands; sqrt-story withdrawn. test_paper46_c3_operator_system.py 13/13.
outer norm-resolvent + three-carrier survive; inner descoped; §5.4 rate-formula/degeneracy tag (cert5).
N_t=1 substrate+SU(2) bit-exact (joint rate +T/4); B1/B3 survive; B2 vacuous; B4 descoped; §1.2 partition + Table-1/abstract fixes.
D_max chain 96/96 load-bearing; B4' descoped; B2' state-level survives; illustrative-Umegaki.

do_not_reflag_remediation: ALL prior fixes through v4.41.0 are CORRECT and must not be re-flagged. Includes cert1-cert5 + the v4.37.0/v4.39.0 sweeps + the v4.40.0 cert5 fixes (incl. p46 C3^op rework -> C_3=1, operator-system test) + the v4.41.0 rem1 fixes: p46 Table 1 column -> C_3=1, AND the Paper 45 C3^op transport (eq:C3_joint_bound -> C_3=1, rem:envelope_v2 withdrawal note, Q4, production c3_joint_panel_sup docstring reframe, test_lorentzian_propinquity.py reframe). p45/p46 C_3=1 is the CORRECT post-rem1 state; the sqrt(1-1/nmax) is correctly withdrawn -- a reviewer must NOT recommend restoring it. che_perales venue DGA 103 (2026) correct. Citation dimension NOT exercised this pass.
